red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the "pp Peter" signature was authorized delegation, not forgery. They will claim Rynette had general authority to sign on Peter's behalf.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) No power of attorney on record; (2) Trust Act requires personal signatures for trustee appointments; (3) Rynette wrote "I have just signed" in first person then signed "pp Peter" — proving she knew she was acting without authority; (4) Neither Daniel nor Jacqueline were informed as required by the Trust Deed.
evidence_needed: Trust deed clause on trustee appointment

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the FNB-to-ABSA switch was a legitimate business decision by majority directors to protect company funds.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) Daniel held SOLE mandate at FNB — no board resolution existed to change banks; (2) 100+ client emails redirecting payments were sent without board authority; (3) The ABSA accounts were opened without Daniel's knowledge; (4) SARS banking details were changed via impersonation ("logged in as you").
evidence_needed: FNB FICA/KYC records proving sole mandate

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the Sage transfer was a routine administrative change after an employee death.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) Peter swore a FALSE affidavit claiming Kayla "recently died" — she died 12 months earlier; (2) The transfer severed the Stock2Shop invoice pipeline; (3) Rynette's own emails document the "sinking" problems she caused; (4) The timing (10 days after trust forgery) proves coordination.

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue Bantjies' multiple roles are common in small business and do not constitute conflicts of interest.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) Six documented conflicts including Commissioner of Oaths on his own affidavit; (2) CFO of George Group (Ketoni's parent) while trustee of FFT (Ketoni's creditor); (3) "I will manufacture an answer" email proves willingness to fabricate; (4) Trust Act s9 requires trustees to avoid conflicts.

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the Ketoni investment is legally unrelated to the revenue diversion and corporate control dispute.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) Temporal convergence — ALL control actions occurred T-9 to T-13 months before May 2026 payout; (2) Bantjies installed as trustee to control distribution; (3) Kevin Derrick connection proves insider knowledge; (4) Ketoni AFS 2024 confirms R18.685M obligation.

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue that Rynette had authorized access to systems and that the dispute is about managerial authorization, not criminal misuse.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) POPIA s14 requires purpose limitation — access for bookkeeping ≠ access for impersonation; (2) Credential sharing ("logged in as you") violates s19 security safeguards; (3) Post-exposure data destruction (Sage capture) violates s14(4) retention requirements.

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the 4-group structure is Daniel's interpretation and that the companies operate as a single family business.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) CIPC records objectively show different director/member compositions; (2) Daniel's June 6 email to Bantjies explicitly warned about inter-group transfers; (3) Companies Act s1 defines "related" and "interrelated" — these groups do NOT meet the statutory definition; (4) The ex parte application described a single "group" without disclosing the 4-group reality.
evidence_needed: CIPC director records for all 22 entities

red_team_critique.critique: Defence will argue the curatorship application was a genuine concern for Jacqueline's welfare.
red_team_critique.counter_strategy: Counter with: (1) Jacqueline signed the Main Trustee document 48 hours before the "betrayal"; (2) The curatorship would give Peter control of Jax's 1/3 trust share (R6.25M); (3) No medical evidence was presented to support the curatorship claim; (4) The timing coincides with the Ketoni payout approach.

meta_cognition.recommendation: CIVIL PRIORITY: Proceed with civil action; strengthen criminal evidence.
